overall.description: A first-person journey through a post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), driving along a muddy path past massive trash mountains and concrete barriers, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance under bright morning sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial landfill access road with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward along the muddy path between red and white concrete barriers, with the massive trash mountain visible to the right

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barrier running parallel to the path on the left side
red and white striped concrete barrier running parallel to the path on the right side
enormous mountain of garbage and debris rising on the right side of the path
tall industrial chimney emitting thick black smoke into the sky
leafless dead tree standing in the wasteland to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person drive along a muddy industrial path flanked by red and white concrete barriers. To the right, a massive trash mountain looms with an industrial smokestack emitting black smoke. The ground is wet with puddles reflecting the bright morning sun, and dead trees dot the left side of the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland with distant city view

events.description: exits the enclosed barrier corridor into open wasteland as the concrete barriers end
futuristic city skyline becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path opens up, approaching the visible city skyline in the distance

entered.detail: distant modern city with tall glass towers and skyscrapers visible on the horizon
tall industrial structures and power transmission towers on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the concrete barriers fall away, revealing a vast wasteland with the massive trash mountain now receding into the distance on the right. A futuristic city skyline appears on the horizon ahead, contrasting with the industrial towers and power lines visible to the left. The ground remains muddy and uneven as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic overlook of landfill and distant city

events.description: camera turns left to reveal the massive trash mountain now dominating the left side of the frame
full panoramic view of the trash mountain slope and the valley leading to the city becomes visible

agents.ego_description: turning left to survey the landscape, revealing the scale of the trash mountain and the city beyond

entered.detail: wide valley view showing the expanse between the trash mountain and the distant city

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left, bringing the massive trash mountain into close view on the left side, revealing its steep slope covered in garbage and debris. The futuristic city skyline shifts to the right side of the frame, visible across the valley. Red and white barriers reappear on the left as the camera continues to pan, showcasing the contrast between the industrial wasteland and the distant urban metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a muddy industrial wasteland that gradually reveals a distant futuristic metropolis. It begins along a narrow path flanked by red and white concrete barriers, passing a massive trash mountain and a smokestack emitting black smoke under a bright morning sun. As the barriers fall away, the landscape opens into a vast expanse where the trash mountain recedes and a towering city skyline emerges on the horizon. The camera then turns left, bringing the steep, debris-covered slope of the trash mountain back into close view while shifting the urban skyline to the right side of the frame. Finally, the view pans across the valley, contrasting the reappearing concrete barriers and industrial decay with the gleaming distant metropolis.
